## Analyzers (2)

### Enrich observables with intelligence

#### [Urlscan.io Scan v0.1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Urlscan.io)
Scan URLs on urlscan.io

- **Author:** ninoseki, Kyle Parrish (@arnydo)
- **License:** MIT
- **Data Types:** `url`, `domain`, `fqdn`

#### [Urlscan.io Search v0.1.1](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Urlscan.io)
Search IPs, domains, hashes or URLs on urlscan.io

- **Author:** ninoseki, Kyle Parrish (@arnydo)
- **License:** MIT
- **Data Types:** `ip`, `domain`, `hash`, `fqdn`, `url`
